audit_items.proof_trace: The function performs a strict 4-step linear teardown: (1) sdsfreesplitres frees state->lines[], (2) dictRelease frees option_to_line whose keys are sdsdup()-independent copies and whose values are integer line-numbers cast to void* (not heap pointers), (3) dictRelease frees rewritten whose keys are sdsnew()-independent copies, (4) zfree(state). No pointer is shared between the three freed data structures, every replaced state->lines[i] is overwritten before teardown (in rewriteConfigRemoveOrphaned and rewriteConfigRewriteLine), and the sole caller at line 2339 immediately returns after the call with no post-release access.
